title: FedRAMP Historical Vulnerability Evaluation and Reporting Activity (VER-TFR-MRH)
description: Machine-readable historical Vulnerability Evaluation and Reporting activity for automated retrieval per VER-TFR-MRH.

activeVulnerabilities.title: Active Vulnerabilities
activeVulnerabilities.description: All non-accepted vulnerabilities. Each record follows the fields required by VER-RPT-VDT.

acceptedVulnerabilities.title: Accepted Vulnerabilities
acceptedVulnerabilities.description: All accepted vulnerabilities. Each record follows the fields required by VER-RPT-AVI.
